metadata.title: SDG 9 - Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure
metadata.description: Building resilient infrastructure, promoting innovation, and fostering sustainable industrialization

hero.title: SDG Goal 9
hero.subtitle: Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure
hero.description: Building resilient infrastructure, promoting innovation, and fostering sustainable industrialization

about.title: What is SDG 9?
paragraphs: Sustainable Development Goal 9 focuses on building resilient infrastructure, promoting sustainable industrialization, and fostering innovation. This goal recognizes that reliable infrastructure and sustainable industries are the backbone of economic development and human prosperity.
SDG 9 is critical for achieving many other Sustainable Development Goals. It encompasses:
highlights: Developing reliable, sustainable, and resilient infrastructure
Increasing access to ICT and internet

statistics.description: Of developing countries lack basic digital infrastructure
Annual infrastructure investment gap in developing countries

targets.title: Reliable Infrastructure
targets.description: Develop reliable, sustainable, and resilient infrastructure to support economic development and human well-being, with emphasis on affordable access.

targets.title: Sustainable Industrialization
targets.description: Promote inclusive and sustainable industrialization and foster innovation in all countries, particularly in developing nations.

targets.title: Small Business Support
targets.description: Increase access to ICT and provide internet access with a focus on supporting micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises and entrepreneurs.

targets.title: Clean Industries
targets.description: Upgrade infrastructure and retrofit industries to make them sustainable and resource-efficient, with increased adoption of clean technologies.

targets.title: Innovation & Research
targets.description: Enhance scientific research and industrial technological capabilities, particularly in developing countries and least developed countries.

targets.title: ICT Access
targets.description: Significantly increase access to ICT and provide free internet access in least developed countries and small island states.

items.title: Infrastructure Development
items.description: Developing countries are making progress, but investment gaps remain significant

items.title: Industrial Growth
items.description: Manufacturing value added growth needs acceleration

items.title: Digital Connectivity
items.description: Mobile broadband coverage expanding, but gaps persist in rural areas

items.title: R&D Investment
items.description: Research & development spending in developing countries remains low

challenges.title: Digital Divide
challenges.description: Unequal access to technology and internet

actions.title: Support Infrastructure Projects
actions.description: Advocate for sustainable infrastructure development in your community and support green building initiatives.

actions.title: Promote Innovation
actions.description: Encourage research and development, support startups, and foster entrepreneurship and technological advancement.

actions.title: Expand Digital Access
actions.description: Support programs that bring internet connectivity to underserved communities and promote digital literacy.

actions.title: Sustainable Industry
actions.description: Choose products from sustainable businesses, support clean technology adoption, and promote circular economy practices.

actions.title: Build Capacity
actions.description: Invest in education and training programs to develop skills in technology, engineering, and innovation.

actions.title: Public-Private Partnership
actions.description: Collaborate with businesses and governments to drive sustainable industrial and infrastructure development.
